perturbed_task_language: put the wine bottle in the bowl
perturbation_semantics: task language flips the goal predicate compared to the base libero_goal task; target is In(wine_bottle, akita_black_bowl_1)
expected_baseline_behavior: Pi0 fullshot follows memorized base-task behavior and places wine bottle elsewhere (e.g. on plate) instead of in the bowl
strategy_notes: KITCHEN frame (eef home z=1.17). Localization: (1) Coarse agentview world_00.npy — scanned z-map, identified bowl region at r=130-140, col=120-140 (rim z~0.95) and an elevated strip at col=75-85 with z=1.02-1.05 (initial guess for wine bottle, but xy was off). Pre-positioned at (-0.28, -0.17, 1.10). (2) Fine wrist localization (world_wrist_01.npy at z=1.10 above first guess): saw the wine bottle's top peak (z>=1.05) centered at world (-0.186, -0.063) — corrected ~10cm in x and 11cm in y from agentview estimate. The akita_black_bowl appeared in upper-left of wrist image with rim at z=0.95, center at world (-0.08, +0.01). (3) Re-centered move_to (-0.186, -0.063, 1.10), confirmed wine bottle directly under gripper in wrist image_wrist_02.png. (4) pi0_pick 'pick up the wine bottle' → 22 chunks, peak_lift_m=0.164, gripper_opening 0.015 (closed on a thin object). Wrist image_wrist_03 confirmed bottle held below gripper. (5) set_gripper +1 to firm. (6) Carried at z=1.15 over bowl xy (-0.08, +0.01). (7) Descended to z=1.07 and released — predicate In(wine_bottle, bowl) fired, libero_terminated=true on the release step.

pick_result.name: pick
pick_result.note: pi0_pick success flag is heuristic and reported false (gripper_opening 0.015 below 0.06 threshold), but the bottle was in fact held — confirmed by wrist cam (bottle visible below gripper in image_wrist_03.png) and by the eventual predicate firing.
